name: claude-hold-my-hand
description: Narrated visual presentations for any codebase topic — watch, listen, interrupt, ask.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @chmh/shared && npm run build -w @chmh/server && npm run build -w @chmh/player
scripts.bundle: npm run build && esbuild packages/server/dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=plugin-dist/server.mjs --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
